language.title: Language
language.description: Interface language. Saved to your profile.

region.title: Region & Currency
region.description: Controls billing currency and payment gateway routing.
region.confirmBody: Switching from {{from}} to {{to}} may change your subscription pricing and payment gateway. Existing active subscriptions keep their current currency until renewal.

theme.title: Theme
theme.lockMessage: Only super admins can change the global style. You can preview presets below.
theme.presetSubtitle: Controls colors, radius, shadows, and typography globally.

myActivity.title: My Activity
myActivity.subtitle: Your recent actions across the platform.

branding.title: Branding
branding.lockMessage: Only super admins can change branding.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage who can access the console and what they can do
users.inviteDescription: Currently, users self-register via the signup page. Share the signup link with them, then assign their role and client here after they sign up.

toast.lastSuperAdmin: At least one super admin must remain.
toast.lastSuperAdminActive: At least one super admin must remain active.

confirm.title: Grant super admin access?
confirm.body: You are about to grant {{email}} full unrestricted access to everything, including user management, destructive operations, and all client data. This is irreversible by them. Only proceed if you fully trust this person.
